description: Chessvia is an AI chess coaching service centered on "Chessy," a voice- and text-enabled chess tutor for playing, analysis, and personalized instruction. Its public site markets gameplay, analysis, and coaching features for chess learners.
summary: Chessvia exposes a public MCP server for chess openings at `https://openings.chessvia.ai/api/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLIs were found.
